description: Kerberos authentication service — AS-REP Roasting, Kerberoasting, user enumeration, and password spraying.

tools.name: GetNPUsers.py (Impacket) — AS-REP Roasting
tools.description: Request TGTs for accounts that have 'Do not require Kerberos preauthentication' enabled.

commands.title: AS-REP Roast with user list
commands.description: Spray a user list for AS-REP roastable accounts and save hashes in Hashcat format.

commands.title: AS-REP Roast a single user
commands.description: Request AS-REP hash for a single known user.

commands.title: AS-REP Roast — enumerate all (authenticated)
commands.description: Authenticate and automatically find all AS-REP roastable accounts in the domain.

tools.name: GetUserSPNs.py (Impacket) — Kerberoasting
tools.description: Request TGS tickets for service accounts to crack offline.

commands.title: Kerberoast — list SPNs
commands.description: List all user accounts with SPNs set (Kerberoastable targets).

commands.title: Kerberoast — request TGS tickets
commands.description: Request TGS tickets and save in crackable format.

tools.name: kerbrute
tools.description: Fast Kerberos brute-forcer for user enumeration and password spraying.

commands.title: User enumeration
commands.description: Enumerate valid domain usernames via Kerberos pre-auth responses.

commands.title: Password spray
commands.description: Spray a single password against all users in the list.

commands.title: Brute-force single user
commands.description: Brute-force a password for a single known username.

tools.name: Rubeus (Windows)
tools.description: Windows-native Kerberos toolkit. Run from a domain-joined host or via C2.

commands.title: AS-REP Roast all vulnerable users
commands.description: Find and roast all AS-REP vulnerable accounts from a domain context.

commands.title: Kerberoast all SPNs
commands.description: Request TGS for all Kerberoastable accounts.

commands.title: Kerberoast a specific SPN
commands.description: Target a specific service account for Kerberoasting.

commands.title: Request TGT with credentials
commands.description: Request a TGT and inject it into the current session.
